stemHtml: Civil Air Transport Operators are required to establish and maintain an approved security training programme which ensures crew members:

options.a: Are competent in handling lethal protective devices (such as guns), whose use is authorised by the State of the Operator.
options.b: Who have received such training are able to act as instructors on security matters for other crew members.
options.c: Act in the most appropriate manner to minimise the consequences of acts of unlawful interference.
options.d: Act in the correct manner when allowing passengers access to the flight deck in flight.
